---
title: "Fertility — DEMOPAST (test)"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffeeba;border-radius:4px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
  <strong>Test section</strong> — live births from ISTAT <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> volumes.
  <a href="index.html">← back to test home</a>
</div>

<div id="noData" style="display:none;background:#e7f1ff;border:1px solid #b6d4fe;border-radius:4px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <strong>Data extraction in progress.</strong> Provincial birth tables (1862–1961) are being digitised
  from the <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> volumes and the <em>Annuari di Statistiche Demografiche</em>.
  This page will populate automatically once <code>data/fertility/fertility_panel.csv</code> is published.
</div>

<div class="slider-container">
  <label for="yearSlider" class="year-label">Year: <span id="yearDisplay">—</span></label><br>
  <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="0" step="1" value="0" style="width:60%;max-width:500px;">
  <div id="yearTicks" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;"></div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1rem 0;">
  <label for="indSelect" style="font-weight:bold;">Indicator: </label>
  <select id="indSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="cbr">Crude Birth Rate (births / 1,000 pop.)</option>
    <option value="births">Total live births</option>
  </select>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 38%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;height:560px;"></div>
    <div id="legendWrapper">
      <div class="legend-header">
        <span class="legend-title">Legend</span>
        <button id="legendToggle" type="button">Hide</button>
      </div>
      <div id="legendContent" class="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="provinceInfo" style="flex:0 0 59%;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;display:none;max-height:700px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <h4 id="provName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Crude Birth Rate (‰)</td><td id="provRate" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Total live births</td><td id="provCount" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
    </table>
    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Birth rate over time</h5>
    <div><canvas id="seriesChart" style="max-height:240px;"></canvas></div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.75rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <a href="../data/fertility/fertility_panel.csv" download>fertility_panel.csv</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const DATA_URL = '../data/fertility/fertility_panel.csv';
const COUNT_FIELD = 'births';
const RATE_FIELD = 'cbr';
const COLORS = ['#fff5eb','#fee6ce','#fdd0a2','#fdae6b','#fd8d3c','#f16913','#d94801','#8c2d04'];
const GEO_AVAILABLE = [1861, 1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931];

const map = L.map('map', {zoomControl:false, attributionControl:false, dragging:false,
  scrollWheelZoom:false, doubleClickZoom:false, boxZoom:false, keyboard:false,
  touchZoom:false}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

let YEARS = [];
let panel = {};      // year -> COD_PROV -> {den, count, rate}
let geojsonCache = {};
let currentLayer = null, currentBreaks = null, seriesChart = null;

function getField() { return document.getElementById('indSelect').value === RATE_FIELD ? 'rate' : 'count'; }
function getYear() { return YEARS[document.getElementById('yearSlider').value]; }
function geoYear(y) {
  return GEO_AVAILABLE.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - y) < Math.abs(a - y) ? b : a);
}
function fmt(n) { return (n == null || n === '') ? 'N/A' : Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US'); }

async function init() {
  let text = null;
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(DATA_URL);
    if (resp.ok) text = await resp.text();
  } catch (e) { /* missing file */ }
  if (!text || text.trim().startsWith('<')) {
    document.getElementById('noData').style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  Papa.parse(text, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!panel[r.year]) panel[r.year] = {};
    panel[r.year][r.COD_PROV] = {den: r.DEN_PROV,
      count: r[COUNT_FIELD] || null, rate: r[RATE_FIELD] || null};
  });
  YEARS = Object.keys(panel).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const slider = document.getElementById('yearSlider');
  slider.max = YEARS.length - 1;
  // thin tick labels: ~8 labels max, always keep first and last
  const step = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(YEARS.length / 8));
  document.getElementById('yearTicks').innerHTML = YEARS.map((y, i) =>
    '<span>' + ((i % step === 0 || i === YEARS.length - 1) ? y : '') + '</span>').join('');
  slider.addEventListener('input', updateMap);
  document.getElementById('indSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);
  updateMap();
}

function computeBreaks() {
  const field = getField();
  const base = panel[YEARS[0]] || {};
  const values = Object.values(base).map(p => p[field]).filter(v => v != null && v > 0);
  if (!values.length) return [0, 1];
  values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
    breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
  }
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(v, breaks) {
  if (v == null) return '#e5e7eb';
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (v > breaks[i]) return COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
  }
  return COLORS[0];
}

function style(feature) {
  const prov = (panel[getYear()] || {})[feature.properties.COD_PROV];
  return {fillColor: getColor(prov ? prov[getField()] : null, currentBreaks),
          weight: 0.8, opacity: 1, color: '#94a3b8', fillOpacity: 0.85};
}

function showProvince(cod, name) {
  const prov = (panel[getYear()] || {})[cod];
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = name + ' (' + getYear() + ')';
  document.getElementById('provRate').textContent = prov ? fmt(prov.rate) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provCount').textContent = prov ? fmt(prov.count) : 'N/A';
  const ctx = document.getElementById('seriesChart').getContext('2d');
  if (seriesChart) seriesChart.destroy();
  const data = YEARS.map(y => {
    const p = (panel[y] || {})[cod];
    return {x: y, y: p ? p.rate : null};
  }).filter(d => d.y != null);
  seriesChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {datasets: [{label: '‰', data: data, borderColor: '#d94801',
      backgroundColor: '#d94801', pointRadius: 3, borderWidth: 1.5}]},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {display: false},
        title: {display: true, text: name + ' — births per 1,000 pop.', font: {size: 12}}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', ticks: {callback: v => v}}, y: {beginAtZero: true}}}
  });
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) { e.target.setStyle({weight: 2, color: '#7c2d12', fillOpacity: 1}); e.target.bringToFront(); },
    mouseout: function(e) { if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target); },
    click: function() { showProvince(feature.properties.COD_PROV, feature.properties.DEN_PROV); }
  });
}

async function updateMap() {
  const year = getYear();
  document.getElementById('yearDisplay').textContent = year;
  const gy = geoYear(year);
  if (!geojsonCache[gy]) {
    geojsonCache[gy] = await fetch('../data/geojson/province_' + gy + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
  }
  currentBreaks = computeBreaks();
  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geojsonCache[gy], {style: style, onEachFeature: onEachFeature}).addTo(map);
  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [10, 10]});
  updateLegend();
}

document.getElementById('legendToggle').addEventListener('click', function() {
  const hidden = document.getElementById('legendWrapper').classList.toggle('legend-hidden');
  this.textContent = hidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide';
});

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentBreaks) return;
  const label = document.getElementById('indSelect').selectedOptions[0].text;
  let html = '<strong>' + label + '</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + fmt(currentBreaks[0]) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < currentBreaks.length; i++) {
    const next = currentBreaks[i + 1];
    const clr = COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
    html += next
      ? '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + fmt(currentBreaks[i]) + '–' + fmt(next) + '</span></div>'
      : '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + fmt(currentBreaks[i]) + '</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:#e5e7eb"></i><span>no data</span></div>';
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

init();
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;">
<p><strong>Sources.</strong> Live births: ISTAT/MAIC, <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> —
annual series 1863–1881 (TAVOLA VI of the 1881 volume, checksum-validated against published
provincial totals) and the 1901, 1911, 1921 and 1931 volumes (TAVOLA I, nati-vivi; each total
validated as the sum of the printed male and female counts, mismatches flagged in the full
extraction file). Crude birth rate = live births / population × 1000, with population linearly
interpolated between flanking censuses. Pola, Trieste and Zara (1931) lack census denominators
and are included only in the full extraction file. Map shows the nearest available historical
boundaries.</p>
<p><strong>Download:</strong> <a href="../data/fertility/fertility_panel.csv" download>fertility_panel.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/fertility/births_full_extraction.csv" download>births_full_extraction.csv</a></p>
<p>Preliminary — test environment.</p>
</div>
```
